privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified correct. The task configures water meter input processing in Emoncms using the PHPFina engine (ID=5) with 10-second intervals. Physical parameters: 1 pulse = 10 liters, 1 m³ = 1000 liters. Test injection: baseline of 20000 pulses, delta of 10 pulses (100 liters) over 10 seconds yields expected total volume of 200.1 m³ and flow rate of 600.0 L/min. Data is fully synthetic, generated by simulated API calls within the test environment.
